blocks.content: By second period, word was out. The team list travels fast at Lincoln High.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: Aye — Jenkins made the list. That's facts.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I BEEN saying. Nobody ever wants to listen.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: Freshman on varsity. Coach Briggs must've seen something fr.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: That's literally the highest compliment he gives. He told Darius Patterson he had good hands and Darius cried.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: LMBOO bruh Darius did NOT cry.

blocks.speaker: Marcus
blocks.content: His eyes got wet. That's the same thing.
Between second and third period I saw Crystal at the water fountain near the library. She was alone. Just filling her bottle, about to turn back toward the senior hall.
This was the moment Jonathan would have walked through without thinking. I slowed down.

blocks.prompt: Crystal hasn't seen you yet. You have about four seconds.

options.label: "I made the team." Say it before you think about it.
Wait for her to turn around first.
Keep walking. Not the right moment.
